llms_txt.content:
# RheoLab Enterprise
> RheoLab Enterprise is a Windows desktop application for storing, comparing, and reporting rheology experiment results from multiple laboratory instruments. Primary website language: Russian.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://rheolab.site/): Product overview, workflows, supported use cases, and contact entry points.
- [FAQ](https://rheolab.site/faq/): Licensing, trial, storage, supported instruments, and deployment questions.
- [Download](https://rheolab.site/download/latest/): Redirector to the latest Windows installer.
- [Privacy](https://rheolab.site/privacy/): Privacy and data-handling policy.
- [Terms](https://rheolab.site/terms/): Terms of use and licensing conditions.

## Documentation
- [Documentation Index](https://rheolab.site/docs/): Main entry point to the product documentation.
- [Quick Start](https://rheolab.site/docs/quick-start/): Install the software, start the trial, open the first file, and save the first result.
- [Data Import](https://rheolab.site/docs/parsing/): Supported file formats and instrument families.
- [Interface](https://rheolab.site/docs/interface/): Main application areas and navigation.
- [Calculation Models](https://rheolab.site/docs/models/): Rheology models and calculated parameters.
- [Reports](https://rheolab.site/docs/reports/): PDF and Excel reporting workflow.
- [Troubleshooting](https://rheolab.site/docs/troubleshooting/): Installation, launch, and import troubleshooting.
- [Documentation FAQ](https://rheolab.site/docs/faq/): Short answers for common evaluation and usage questions.

## Contact
- [Commercial Contact](mailto:info@rheolab.site): Product demos, licensing, and rollout questions.
- [Technical Support](mailto:support@rheolab.site): Installation, import, backup, and troubleshooting questions.

## Optional
- [llms-full.txt](https://rheolab.site/llms-full.txt): Expanded machine-readable summary of the site, product facts, and documentation map.

llms_full_txt.content:
# RheoLab Enterprise
> RheoLab Enterprise is a Windows desktop application for laboratory teams and technical specialists working with rheology experiment data. The product focuses on local-first storage, comparison of experiment series, and report preparation. Primary website language: Russian.

## Product Facts
- Product type: Windows desktop software for rheology data workflows.
- Core workflow: import a file, review the graph and calculated values, save the result to the library, compare series, and export reports.
- Storage model: the public site states that experiment data is stored locally on the user's computer.
- Trial: a 30-day full-feature trial is available.
- Connectivity: daily work is local-first; internet is mainly required for activation, updates, and some additional network-assisted scenarios.

## Supported Inputs Mentioned Publicly
- Instrument families: Grace, Chandler, Fann, OFITE, BSL-R1, Brookfield.
- File formats: `.xls`, `.xlsx`, `.csv`, `.txt`, `.dat`.

## Primary Audience
- Laboratory teams working with rheology measurements.
- Engineering and technical departments handling experiment series.
- Researchers and lab managers who need a structured result library and repeatable reporting.

## High-Value Pages
- [Home](https://rheolab.site/): Main product overview and contact path.
- [FAQ](https://rheolab.site/faq/): Public FAQ covering trial, licensing, file formats, instrument support, local storage, and deployment context.
- [Download](https://rheolab.site/download/latest/): Latest Windows installer redirect.
- [Privacy](https://rheolab.site/privacy/): Privacy commitments, local data handling, and support/log submission notes.
- [Terms](https://rheolab.site/terms/): License types, restrictions, user data responsibility, and legal contacts.

## Documentation Map
### Start Here
- [Documentation Index](https://rheolab.site/docs/): Documentation hub.
- [Quick Start](https://rheolab.site/docs/quick-start/): Installation, trial activation, first import, and first saved result.

### Operational Help
- [Documentation FAQ](https://rheolab.site/docs/faq/): Short answers to common evaluation and usage questions.
- [Troubleshooting](https://rheolab.site/docs/troubleshooting/): Install, launch, white screen, data, and logging issues.

### Product Workflows
- [Data Import](https://rheolab.site/docs/parsing/): File formats, source instruments, and import failure guidance.
- [Interface](https://rheolab.site/docs/interface/): Main areas of the application and the shortest learning path.
- [Reports](https://rheolab.site/docs/reports/): PDF and Excel reporting flow.

### Domain-Specific Reference
- [Calculation Models](https://rheolab.site/docs/models/): Power Law, Bingham, and reference notes around model calculations and parameters.

## Contact Endpoints
- [Commercial Contact](mailto:info@rheolab.site): Product demos, licensing, and deployment planning.
- [Technical Support](mailto:support@rheolab.site): Setup, import, backup, and troubleshooting.
- [Privacy Contact](mailto:privacy@rheolab.site): Privacy questions.
- [Legal Contact](mailto:legal@rheolab.site): Legal questions.
